summary: 0.6.50 improves scrub feedback by reusing the player-owned presentation timeline for readback and by refreshing demo or plugin scrub UI during active scrub interactions.
operatorSignals: The next queued slice after natural media ordering was more aggressive scrub feedback while dragging.
The goal was to avoid layering a second scrub system and instead improve feedback through the existing readback seam.
actionsTaken: Added one shared presentation-state reader that can reuse the player-owned master timeline during seek and resume windows.
Hooked active scrub interactions into an immediate demo and plugin UI refresh path with a lightweight refresh interval.
Reduced the old plugin scrub display holdoff so attached scrub feedback catches up faster.
nonGoals: No slideshow behavior in this slice.
No right-stick volume, favorites, or builder layout changes in this slice.
